All right, today I'm going to show you how to create your ads. This is after you have set up your pixel and your custom conversion. One thing you want to make sure is that you are on the right ad account that you set up with your business manager. So just click on here and you can make sure that it is the right ad account. All right, so we're just going to dive right into it. So first things first is we want to start by creating a campaign. We're going to call this a six week challenge. Campaign objectives should always be conversions. Ad set. We'll start with a mail ad. So we'll call it mobile mail one. And then your actual ad, we'll call it mobile mail one ad. I like to put numbers behind it so that I know which ad is which and I like to put ad after the name of the ad. So I know which ad set it's corresponding to. So we're going to save to draft. Nothing we need to do here for the campaign level. So we're going to close that out. Then we'll head over to the ad set level. And then what you want to do is you want to hover over edit. Then once this comes up. This is where we are going to tell the ad basically where we wanted to go out to. So right here is where you're going to place your custom conversion that you have set up previously. So. Mine is not active because I do not have any ads that are going out. But yours should be active. This gray dot should be green. So go ahead and click on your custom conversion that's in the green for the daily budget. We start off at 15. And scroll down here. This is where you are going to place your. Your gyms address. And once you have your address you'll go ahead and this needs to be changed to seven mile radius. A funny thing with Facebook. If you when you change the mile radius if you don't hit enter after you change it. It won't change. So if you know I put 10 and I just click out of it it's just going to stay where it originally was. So you need to make sure that when you put it in when you put the mile radius in there just make sure you hit interact. And now we're going to scroll down the age range is going to be 23 to 55. And this is a male ad set. So we are going to make sure that we select men. We'll scroll down edit placements. The vice types you're going to uncheck desktop because we want these to be mobile ads. Then from here marketplace down you're going to want to uncheck everything there. So the only things that should be checked are instant articles and feeds. Scroll down. Your conversion window is going to be one day quick. And that is how you set up the ad set for men or. And women. It's just the ad set in general. Right now we're going to close this out and we are going to create our female ad set. So we're going to go ahead up here where it says create. Click on that. It's going to be the existing campaign. I'm going to call this one mobile female. One. And when you're creating a new ad set after you have one already created it's always going to leave out the ad. So you want to just come here create new ad and we'll call this one mobile. Female one. And save that one to draft and you're going to set this one up the same exact way as you set up the mobile mail. The only difference is you're going to tell the ad set that this is a female ad. So then 15 for the daily budget to start. And put your gym address there. And remember seven mile radius. Adrian is going to be 23 to 55. And women. Edit placements. All devices uncheck desktop and uncheck everything going down. Right in your conversion window is going to be a one day click. Now one thing I want you to pay attention to is your reach on the high end. It should be a thousand or more. So like if you have say you have something like I do 2700 which is fine as long as you have a thousand or more. You're golden. Right now we're going to move over to the ads. And what you're going to do is hover over it and hit edit. Once you're on here your Facebook page. Make sure that you have your Facebook page there. And what we're going to do is we're going to select video. We're going to select the video. I have videos that are already uploaded. Most likely you don't yet. What you're going to do is click upload videos and I have them downloaded here. So you just drag and drop them in. Now the video is uploaded. So while that video is uploading we're going to go ahead and go grab our ad copy. And over to lead gen. Expand all. And it's under turning the lead machine on. You're going to click on download the ads. Same place where you downloaded the actual videos for your ads. We had the very bottom download and copy. We're working on the female ad. So what we're going to do is we're going to copy all this. We're going to go back over to the ads manager. In the text field. We're going to paste the ad copy. So what we need here now is our opt-in link to our funnel. So we're going to head over to click funnels. On your opt-in page. You're going to copy your opt-in link. Head back over to your ads manager. Paste the ad copy. Paste the link. You're opt-in link. Everywhere where you see it says link. Go ahead and highlight that. Paste your opt-in link there. It's going to be one at the top and one at the bottom. Then you're going to paste it in website URL. And last thing we need to do is our headline. I would use this click here to save your spot. You can put anything there. Just make sure it's something that's relating to like a. We want you to click here. Your call to action. You can use learn more or you can use sign up whichever one you choose. And that's it. You'll hit publish and that will make the ad go live. So we will set up the mobile mail ad. The same way the only difference here is we are going to be using a mail video. If you don't have a mail video uploaded already. Just go ahead and download it and drag and drop it over here. I'm going to go and use one that I already have uploaded. So now it's a mail ad. So what we need to do is go back to our ad copy and we need to grab the mail ad copy. So we're going to copy this and head back over. And paste it here. And then we need to grab our opt in link. So the opt in link is going to be the same for male and female ads. Same thing is in the female ad copy everywhere where it says link. So you're going to go ahead and paste in your opt in link. And under your website URL, go ahead and paste that there too. And then last thing, your headline. Alright, then you're going to hit publish and that'll make this ad go live as well. One thing I do want to tell you, you will have three female adsets and three male adsets. So to add another male ad set, you'll just hit create and go through the same process like we did with the female. Alright guys, good luck and we will see you in the next video.
